Home›Partnerships›Referral Programs› CMMC Compliance
Referral Partnership

CMMC Compliance
Referral Program

Earn 15% on every engagement you refer. Connect your clients and contacts with world-class cmmc compliance services — we handle the delivery, you earn the commission.

How the Referral Program Works

Our referral program is designed for professionals who regularly work with organizations that need cmmc compliance — including IT service providers, consultants, attorneys, accountants, insurance brokers, and other trusted advisors. When your referral becomes a client, you earn 15% of the engagement value — with no cap, no minimum, and no ongoing obligation.

Who Should Refer CMMC Compliance?

This program is ideal for professionals and businesses with regular access to: DoD contractors and subcontractors required to achieve CMMC Level 2 or 3 certification.

  • Managed service providers (MSPs) and IT consultants
  • Business attorneys and corporate law firms
  • Accounting and CPA firms advising on risk and compliance
  • Cyber insurance brokers and risk advisors
  • Executive recruiters and HR consultants
  • Financial advisors and investment firms
  • Other cybersecurity firms without cmmc compliance capability

What Your Referral Receives

Every referral receives the same caliber of service as our direct clients — expert practitioners, documented methodologies, and clear deliverables. We never treat referred clients as second-tier engagements.

  • Direct engagement with our senior practitioners — no junior staff assigned to referred work
  • Clear scope, timeline, and deliverable documentation from day one
  • Confidential handling — your referral relationship is disclosed only if you choose
  • Regular status updates available to you as the referring partner
  • Post-engagement report summaries available for your records

Commission Structure

Referral commissions are paid on the total engagement value of work completed by your referred client. Commissions are paid net-30 after client payment is received.

  • Standard commission: 15% of total engagement value
  • Recurring engagements: 15% on all work during the first 12 months of the client relationship
  • No minimums: Commissions paid on all engagement sizes
  • No cap: Unlimited referral volume and commission earnings
  • Payment method: ACH, wire transfer, or check — your choice

Referring Is Simple

  1. Register as a referral partner by scheduling a brief introductory call
  2. When you identify a prospective client, submit a referral via email or our partner portal
  3. We conduct an initial consultation with the prospect — you're welcome to join or stand aside
  4. If they engage, commission tracking begins from day one of the signed agreement
  5. Commission pays out net-30 after client invoice is paid

Program Details

  • Commission: 15%
  • Recurring: First 12 months
  • Payment: Net-30
  • No referral minimum
  • No exclusivity required
  • NDA available

Ideal Referral Sources

  • MSPs & IT Consultants
  • Attorneys & Law Firms
  • CPA & Accounting Firms
  • Cyber Insurance Brokers
  • Executive Recruiters
  • Financial Advisors

Become a Referral Partner

Schedule a 20-minute call to discuss the program and register your first referral.

Schedule Call Email Partners Team
